creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Updating with PORTMASTER fails with the following:

gstreamer1-1.14.4 conflicts with gstreamer1-plugins-bad-1.12.3_2 (installs files into same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/include/gstreamer-1.0/gst/base/gstaggregator.h

ERROR CODE 70

I did review /usr/ports/UPDATING and could find no reports of additional actions or steps needed for this update.
